Starting at 7:00 AM instead of 8:00 might give me a head start on the morning rush. Ending at 19:00 (7 PM) could help with the evening dinner orders. But would that make my total hours too long? Let's see—7 to 7 is 12 hours, which is a bit more than before but manageable.

I need to balance between working longer hours and making sure I don't get too tired. If the extra two hours allow me to pick up more orders during peak times, it might improve my earnings. Plus, since others are ranked similarly, changing my timing could give me an edge.

So, maybe shifting my start time earlier and finish later will help increase both the number of orders I can take and the distance I cover, leading to better rankings today.
